routeNotes: Useful as a broad public fare comparison anchor.
defaultGoal: Compare visible public fares for the route and note the cheapest reasonable option.

routeNotes: Useful for cross-checking aggregator spread and alternate carriers.
defaultGoal: Check public fare ranges and note whether the route is dominated by sponsored ordering.

routeNotes: Useful for another aggregator view of the same route.
defaultGoal: Compare public fares for the route and capture one concrete visible itinerary.

routeNotes: Often strong for Asia routes and low-cost carrier comparisons.
defaultGoal: Check route pricing and note if Trip.com exposes lower public fares or carrier mixes.
Check direct airline pricing and baggage caveats for the route.

routeNotes: Strong low-cost carrier for Malaysia and Southeast Asia routes.
defaultGoal: Check direct airline pricing and note whether the route is cheaper than the aggregator baseline.

routeNotes: Important full-service regional option for Malaysia-linked routes.
defaultGoal: Check regional airline pricing and service details for the exact route.
